category_sources: source_facts.description says Static code analysis tool for HTML; official HTMLHint site describes it as a static code analysis tool for HTML.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub organization use HTMLHint; source_facts.name is htmlhint.
docs_sources: Official HTMLHint website provides getting started, configuration, usage options, and rule documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; official HTMLHint GitHub organization pins htmlhint/HTMLHint as the public project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies HTML static analysis; official GitHub topics include javascript, html, analysis, code-analysis, and code-quality.
